title: Small cleanup on buildah rmi to make code cleaner
body:
While adding rmi to ocid, I was asked to make this change, so want
to keep the code in buildah and ocid for these functions as close as
possible to the same.

comments.body: Missing "Signed-off By" (can be fixed with "git commit --amend -s" and re-pushing your branch), otherwise LGTM.
